content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Clear the String". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1132/problem/F
constraints: s contains only lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single string s of length n, containing only lowercase English letters.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the minimum number of operations required to clear the string.

solution.approach: Use a stack to keep track of the characters that need to be cleared.
